Name: Oviva
Description:
Oviva is digitising dietetics to help people with chronic conditions related to diet and lifestyle learn how to better self-manage and improve their health. Our mission is to revolutionise access and outcomes for dietetics.

We convert traditional face-to-face dietetic care into digital programmes such as for type 2 diabetes, paediatric allergy and cardiovascular disease. People complete e-learning modules, tracking their intake, weight and activity via our app, and have a dedicated dietitian to support them improve their health. Our expert system analysis patient inputs and provides recommend...

Name: ANYbotics
Description:
ANYbotics is the only European OEM of 4-legged autonomous robots for industrial inspection.
Our end-to-end robotic solution, ANYmal, automates industrial inspections, providing end users with better data to maximize equipment uptime and improve staff's safety, while reducing costs.

Name: DeepJudge
Description:
Law firms, corporations and financial institutions such as banks, insurances and consultancies are producing hundreds of millions of legal documents that sit within their databases. Very frequently a question comes of the sort “Have we done this before?” or “Have we answered this question previously?” or “Do we have a good template / clause / starting point?”. These questions currently rely on memory or sending mass emails to the company in order to acquire the answer.

DeepJudge connects the users to their knowledge vault!
Concretely, DeepJudge helps each individual to find and leverage know...

Name: Jua
Description: Jua is building a universal physics simulator tackling weather prediction for energy traders as the first use case.

Name: Unique
Description: FSI companies face inefficient processes and financial pressures, requiring AI assistants to overcome high costs. In most companies today, traditional research methods and human expertise are relied upon to analyze data, make decisions, and address customer inquiries. Access to information is limited to databases, manuals, and internal documents, often requiring extensive time and effort to locate and synthesize relevant data. Unique's Use Case Factory offers over 50 proven AI assistants to streamline FSI teams, reducing administration and increasing client engagement. Knowledge workers levera...

Name: Zitadel
Description: Zitadel is modernizing the Identity and Access Management (IAM) category by focusing on developer-first, open source identity infrastructure designed for modern multi-tenant, cloud-native applications. In a market traditionally dominated by complex enterprise solutions, Zitadel brings simplicity and flexibility to enterprises.

Name: embotech AG
Description:
Embotech is a leading developer of cutting-edge decision-making solutions for real-time applications. Our embeddable software empowers autonomous systems to make decisions by solving complex optimization problems in milliseconds, bringing significant improvements in safety, flexibility, productivity and energy efficiency. Current applications include automotive, industrial and aerospace solutions.

The company focuses on providing software solutions for the adoption of optimal decision making. For the aerospace vertical this involves G&C flight software for reusable launchers (ascent, boost-b...

Name: Tethys Robotics - Switzerland
Description:
Tethys Robotics automates underwater infrastructure inspections by developing
autonomous and compact robotic solutions designed to operate in the most challenging water conditions.

By integrating advanced sensor technologies, AI-driven mapping, and durable engineering, we enable efficient, safe, and consistent data collection in low-visibility and turbulent waters. Our product, Tethys ONE, automates critical underwater operations — from infrastructure inspec-tions to environmental assessments. We advance the capabilities and impact of underwater work worldwide, focusing on the following mar...

Name: Calvin Risk
Description:
AI adoption is growing rapidly, but its deployment often faces significant risks and challenges. Organizations struggle with understanding, managing, and mitigating the risks posed by AI systems, such as bias, safety issues, and regulatory non-compliance.

Current processes for AI risk assessment are manual, inconsistent, and resource-intensive, leaving gaps in accountability and reliability. This creates a pressing need for robust solutions that can ensure the transparency, safety, and regulatory alignment of AI. Without these safeguards, organizations risk costly compliance violations, reput...

Name: veezoo
Description:
Veezoo is a search-based self service analytics tool that enables every user to find and visualise new insights from their database - irrespective of their technical skills. With Veezoo, users can be operational from Day One: it only takes a few minutes to connect a new database and get started with the Veezoo's platform.

It enables employees to perform their day job better, reduces bottlenecks and dependencies on other teams, thereby enhancing the overall efficiency of an organization. It eliminates the need for ad hoc requests for reports - which is distracting occurrence for an already o...
Team Size: João Pedro, Marcos Felipe and Till

Name: Decentriq
Description:
Decentriq, the “Switzerland of data”, is a confidential data collaboration platform. By enforcing compliance and control with advanced privacy technologies, it helps enterprises scale data collaborations across organizational boundaries and unlock value from data that would otherwise be too sensitive to use.

Designed for both data scientists and business users, collaborators use Decentriq’s data clean rooms to analyze sensitive data without sharing it. Powered by confidential computing, data remains encrypted throughout its lifecycle and is verifiably never accessible to another party — not ...

Name: Fotokite
Description: Fotokite designs, manufactures, and supports Public Safety teams with live on-site and remotely streamed situational awareness solutions to help them stay safe, save lives, and serve their communities. With Fotokite's fully autonomous technology, our data gathering systems are mounted on top of Public Safety vehicles and operate with the single push of a button, streaming thermal and RGB video to help size-up emergency response scenes on a daily basis across the world.

Name: Centi AG
Description: Payment infrastructure running on a highly performant blockchain; making payments much cheaper but allowing clients to stay in their used web2 environments

Name: GenTwo
Description:
At GenTwo, we enable financial institutions, asset managers, and advisors to create and scale investment products as easily as booking a flight. We do this through our flagship platforms: GenTwo Pro and the GenTwo Pro AMC Engine.

In detail:
We help a) Asset managers and advisors create unique, off-balance-sheet investment products at speed and low cost, using GenTwo Pro. b) We help banks and brokers build their own scalable, white-labeled product engines (AMC Engines) that allow for mass customization and efficient product creation across all asset classes—traditional and digital.

What we ac...

Name: Starmind
Description: Starmind is the Human Intelligence layer for the GenAI era. It connects employees to real human expertise instantly and in the flow of work. It automatically maps who knows what based on real workspace activity, so people stop guessing and start executing. We don’t replace GenAI–we make it smarter, more reliable, and grounded in human truth.

Name: Apheros
Description:
Apheros tackles a the most critical challenge in high-performance computing (HPC): cooling. Apheros' innovative metal foams offer superior heat transfer, excellent flow properties, and high compatibility with existing liquid cooling systems. The foams provide 1000x the surface area of competitors' products, which translates into exceptional heat transfer capabilities. Additionally, the scalable and efficient manufacturing processes make the foams a cost-effective solution.
Designed for easy integration, the foams can be easily integrated into both single-phase and two-phase liquid cooling sys...

Name: Schuman Financial AG
Description: MVP is launching this autumn. Major European Exchanges are already onboard.

Name: Selma Finance AG
Description:
For people who want to grow their wealth and make sure their financial future is secured in the best way – but don’t know how – Selma is the digital financial advisor that makes investing and financial planning easy and effortless.

Selma manages your money automatically, gives personalized advice & tips about your finances, and offers help from experts at any time. That way you can worry less about your future, feel reassured, and have more time to enjoy your life.

Name: tiun.
Description:
tiun. was founded in 2023 as a Swiss B2B2C fintech company based in Zurich.

Our journey started with a simple idea: enabling the next generation to connect their mobile wallets to any application and pay only for the time they consume—much like SBB EasyRide, but for any app.

Our mission is to establish a new standard that enhances interoperability between wallets and applications, delivering a seamless onboarding and payment experience for modern consumers.

We provide media and streaming businesses with the commercial infrastructure they need to convert more users into paying customers and ...

Name: Wyden
Description: Wyden is the global leader in institutional digital asset trading technology. By covering the entire trade lifecycle and supporting seamless custody, core banking and portfolio management system integration as well as full trade lifecycle automation, the Wyden platform streamlines digital assets trading. Engineered by a team of trading system veterans and crypto asset experts, Wyden offers best-in-class integrated infrastructure solutions that meet the highest institutional needs. Wyden has offices in Zurich, New York and Singapore.

Name: Scandit
Description:
Scandit is the leader in smart data capture giving superpowers to workers, customers and businesses by providing actionable insights and automating end-to-end processes.

Our Smart Data Capture platform enables smart devices, such as smartphones, drones, digital eyewear and robots to interact with physical items by capturing data from barcodes, text, IDs and objects with unmatched speed, accuracy and intelligence.

Scandit accurately scans up to 3x faster than dedicated scanners in challenging light or at angles, on damaged labels, across multiple codes on any smart device.

We enable innovati...

Name: Calingo Insurance AG
Description:
We are convinced that insurance must become radically simple to provide maximum customer convenience. This includes fair products, uncomplicated distribution channels, and a digital offering. And that's exactly what Calingo does. Thanks to our positioning at the Point of Need and based on the data available, we can offer customers personalized insurance at just the right moment.
Integrated in the customer journey of the primary product, the customer benefits from maximum convenience, when renting an apartment, buying a pet or a new e-bike in an online shop.
E.g. when acquiring a new pet, the n...

Name: Avrios
Description:
Founded in 2015, Avrios is the first fully digital vehicle fleet manager and one of the fastest growing startups in Zurich. We currently have over 600 clients including world leaders in sports goods, drinks, pharma and consulting. The Avrios web-based platform stands for mobility and helps our customers make complex decisions, automating buying, leasing, managing and selling their vehicles at the click of just a few buttons.

We call Zürich our home but, with a team of 55, featuring over 17 nationalities, we are a group of ambitious and talented people from all around the world. Fostering a t...

Name: Locatee
Description: Locatee helps organizations all over the world understand their space usage, make better real estate decisions, and create work environments where people don’t have to work, but want to.

Name: TONI Digital
Description:
The Swiss insurance market is expensive, complex, and slow to innovate. Customers demand simpler, more affordable, and digital-first solutions—but traditional insurers struggle to deliver.

At Toni Digital, we change this by offering cost-effective, white-label insurance solutions seamlessly embedded into businesses that customers already trust—banks, retailers, and mobility providers.

How do we do it?
We design tailored insurance products under our partners’ brands, creating new revenue streams and increasing customer loyalty:

A car dealership can offer branded car insurance at the point of...

Name: Oxyle AG
Description:
The Swiss Solution to a Global Problem​. We protect our precious water resources, humans, and our environment from the negative impacts of highly persistent, mobile and toxic micropollutants with our efficient and sustainable technology.

Micropollutants represent a massive range of organic pollutants that are released from products used by all of us daily. Pharmaceuticals, hormones, antibiotics, pesticides, personal care products, industrial chemicals, forever chemicals or PFAS, etc. These persistent compounds are non-biodegradable, bio-active, carcinogenic, and toxic to the lives of humans a...

Name: neon Switzerland
Description:
Excessive fees, inflexible opening times, too much bureaucracy and complicated, slow apps. To us, it was clear: it can’t go on like that. That’s why we built neon.

neon is an account on your smartphone, the way we want it to be. Super cheap - no base fees. Fast and independent. Mobile without limits. And that's only the beginning, because neon grows with you

Name: SIX Group
Description: finance stuff

Name: CrowdSports
Description:
CrowdSport provides a platform where football fans can participate in funding and shaping their favorite clubs and earning financial rewards based on club performance, along with unique personal experiences.
The business model is coordinated with FIFA and meets all financial regulatory requirements, as acknowledged by FINMA with a non-action letter. The platform launched in late summer 2024, with commitments from a dozen first-tier football clubs in Germany, Switzerland, and Austria, with other team sports soon to follow.

Name: Sleepiz
Description:
Sleepiz AG (Ltd.) is a Zürich based startup with the aim to enable the medical community to take healthcare into the home environment. Sleepiz provides a comfortable and easy to use solution with a device that is simply placed on the bedside table. The device operates in a non-contact fashion and measures movements originating from heart contractions and breathing patterns as well as body motions with medical grade accuracy.

By making use of wireless millimeter wave technology, sensor fusion and artificial intelligence, Sleepiz will in the future not only be able to diagnose sleep disorders b...

Name: SERA Intelligence
Description: SERA is an AgTech company that offers a cultivation management & data analytics platform for greenhouses using machine learning.

Name: Healactively
Description:
Unspecific back pain is a condition affecting 630 million people worldwide, 72 million in the US, 92 million in Europe, and 2.4 million in Switzerland and is fast growing due to sedentary lifestyles, obesity, tobacco (...) . It is the leading cause of disability worldwide.

Our purpose is to make life free of back pain. Our mission is to empower individuals and organizations with the world's most personalized back wellness coach.
Healactively disrupts a costly, inefficient, fragmented market by leveraging expert knowledge, AI for tailored, user centric interactive solutions.

The app offer...

Name: Glimpse Health
Description: At Glimpse Health, we aim to develop state-of-the-art digital biomarkers and establish them as the new gold standard for fatigue quantification. Our idea is to support pharmaceutical companies in demonstrating the efficacy of fatigue treatments. Long-term, we want to use our biomarkers to help patients regain their independence and productivity and assist doctors in their clinical decision-making. Until now, we have used Multiple Sclerosis (MS) as our prototype disease. However, we want our tools to be disease-independent. Therefore, it is a high priority for us to validate our solution in oth...

Name: Farmy Switzerland
Description:
Farmy is a food tech company.
Farmy is the No. 1 online market place in Switzerland for sustainable grocery shopping, connecting more than 1000 regional and sustainable food makers with end customers.
Farmy disrupts by bypassing the wholesale and delivering with e-vans. Like this we eliminate food waste, reduce CO2 exhaustions and are able to provide the freshest products on the market and the producers benefit from additional revenues and fair margins.

Name: Exnaton
Description: Our software “EnergyCommunity” empowers electricity providers to set up energy communities in their distribution areas. Households can directly buy renewable electricity from their neighbors (from ‘peer to peer’) on the EnergyCommunity platform and can track their environmental impact with the EnergyCommunity app. This entirely new, digital energy experience makes investing in the energy transition simple and fun. In the background, EnergyCommunity optimizes and bills electricity flows in a simple and efficient way for the utility companies and allows them to tap into new revenue streams aroun...

Name: Way Ahead Technologies AG
Description:
Making driving safer, more efficient and more entertaining - real-time AR and 3D experiences in the vehicle and beyond.

Based on computer vision, we build highly precise AR-Technology, allowing us to place virtual content into driving cars through heads up displays or AR glasses.

Way Ahead Technologies is offering a software solution designed for augmented reality head-up displays, virtual-cockpits, mobile devices and more. The computer vision based technology can track, map, match and visualize real driving live and in 3D. With our highly precise and adaptable system, we can provide unique...

Name: Timly Software AG
Description:
Timly Inventory is a cloud-based asset tracking, management and automation tool to track the activities around a wide variety of physical assets.

When a CRM helps companies manage all activities around clients, Timly tracks all activities around your inventory. Timly provides companies with an overview on their assets, help them track where assets are and plan their use. Each asset is labeled with a unique QR-code, allowing users to access the asset's digital twin purely by scanning the QR-code with a smartphone, thereby bringing the information to the user where the assets are located: On a...

Name: Gimme - Ordering & Payment
Description:
Gimme is a platform that dramatically reduces lines, transform the guest experience and see that all important boost in sales. Guests can order, reorder and pay with Gimme. Without the need to download an app. 📱

We want to save your guest's time and not wait in line. Social is our sauce. With gamified experience, your guests can unlock discounts with friends, send gifts, and collect points 🎁

- Integrated into your POS
- No app download
- No additional hardware costs

Name: FundFirms
Description:
FundFirms is a blockchain integrated SME investment platform that leverages DeFi in order to connect real-world firms with a global network of investors throughout the blockchain, while minimizing restrictions that would otherwise hinder capital mobility, creating a truly global and efficient investment platform for supporting projects, ventures and freelancers.

From a fintech startup in Switzerland, to a café owner in Australia, to an independent farmer in Brazil . We want to foster connections between on-chain investors, small & medium business owners, entrepreneurs and freelancers. By brin...

Name: Circular Flow Technologies
Description:
We provide a technology that treats and concentrates wastewater on-site at the bathroom scale to produce a dry pathogen-free fertilizer product. We transform the bathroom from a waste emission towards a fertilizer production site using our innovative on-site treatment technology.

Our first product is an on-site urine treatment and dehydration unit that enables wastewater treatment off the grid and resource recovery at the household or building scale. The technological unit will be embedded in a regular service scheme, including the collection of the nutrient rich fertilizer products.
Targeted...
